issue_summary: In transform.FastSineTransformer, replaced the pair transform2() / inverseTransform2() with two factory methods: create() and createOrthogonal() .
javadoc_before:
/** * Inversely transform the given real data set. *

* The formula is fk = (2/N) ∑n=0N-1 Fn sin(π nk/N) *

* * @param f the real data array to be inversely transformed * @return the real inversely transformed array * @throws IllegalArgumentException if any parameters are invalid */
